RIASEC.TITLE: Discover the RIASEC Test
RIASEC.DESCRIPTION: A scientific and recognized method to identify your professional interests and guide you towards careers that truly match you.

WHAT.TITLE: What is the RIASEC Test?
WHAT.DESCRIPTION: The RIASEC test is a psychological evaluation tool developed by the American psychologist John Holland. It identifies 6 types of professional personality to help you choose a career that matches your interests and aptitudes.
WHAT.CARD_DESC: Evaluate your personality based on 6 key dimensions of career guidance.

REALISTIC.TITLE: Realistic
REALISTIC.DESCRIPTION: Prefers practical activities, manual work, and structured environments.

INVESTIGATIVE.TITLE: Investigative
INVESTIGATIVE.DESCRIPTION: Likes to analyze, understand, and solve complex problems.

ARTISTIC.TITLE: Artistic
ARTISTIC.DESCRIPTION: Seeks creativity, personal expression, and innovation.

SOCIAL.TITLE: Social
SOCIAL.DESCRIPTION: Prioritizes helping others, collaboration, and communication.

ENTERPRISING.TITLE: Enterprising
ENTERPRISING.DESCRIPTION: Enjoys leading, persuading, and achieving ambitious goals.

CONVENTIONAL.TITLE: Conventional
CONVENTIONAL.DESCRIPTION: Prefers organization, precision, and structured environments.

QUIZ.TITLE: Questionnaire
QUIZ.DESCRIPTION: Answer 60 questions about your preferences and interests.

ANALYSIS.TITLE: Analysis
ANALYSIS.DESCRIPTION: Your answers are analyzed according to the 6 RIASEC dimensions.

PROFILE.TITLE: Profile
PROFILE.DESCRIPTION: Receive your personalized profile with your dominant dimensions.

RECOMMEND.TITLE: Recommendations
RECOMMEND.DESCRIPTION: Discover the careers and training programs that match you.

CTA.TITLE: Ready to discover your profile?
CTA.DESCRIPTION: Start your RIASEC test now and receive your personalized recommendations in 10 minutes.
